added.description: Stan finally decides to do something about his secret baldness and enlists the help of Josay Bosay, Roger's famed hair-stylist-to-the-stars persona.

added.description: When Stan realizes he can't cry, he asks Steve to teach him empathy.
added.title: Cry Baby

added.title: Crystal Clear

added.description: Stan and the family go out to dinner at a buffet restaurant! Meanwhile, Roger becomes a flower.

added.description: Francine and Roger get lost in a good book (or five) after Francine escapes an embarrassing situation. Stan reluctantly hangs out at the library.
added.title: Flush After Reading

added.description: After Stan sells off the coveted family plot, the family opens their own cemetery in the backyard with the help of basketball Hall-of-Famer Scottie Pippen.

added.description: Stan and Francine go back in time to settle an argument.

added.title: Steve's Franken Out

added.description: A new friendship causes Hayley to start worrying she might be slowly turning into Francine. Steve and his friends try out for Roger's improv troupe.
added.title: The Sinister Fate!!

added.description: It's Halloween night and Stan is missing, so the Smith gang heads to the spooky, abandoned CIA headquarters to investigate.
added.title: Z.O.I.N.C.S.

added.title: Fraud of the Dead: Zombie-docu-pocalypse
